testcase.classname: computeSvgPadding should return padding ratios for SVG with viewBox padding
testcase.name: computeSvgPadding should return padding ratios for SVG with viewBox padding

testcase.classname: computeSvgPadding should return null for SVG with no meaningful padding
testcase.name: computeSvgPadding should return null for SVG with no meaningful padding

testcase.classname: computeSvgPadding should return null for SVG without viewBox
testcase.name: computeSvgPadding should return null for SVG without viewBox

testcase.classname: computeSvgPadding should return null for non-SVG input
testcase.name: computeSvgPadding should return null for non-SVG input

testcase.classname: computeSvgPadding should clamp negative ratios to zero
testcase.name: computeSvgPadding should clamp negative ratios to zero

testcase.classname: computeSvgPadding should clean up temporary DOM element
testcase.name: computeSvgPadding should clean up temporary DOM element

testcase.classname: applyLogo should clear existing content
testcase.name: applyLogo should clear existing content

testcase.classname: applyLogo should add jp-MainLogo-custom class
testcase.name: applyLogo should add jp-MainLogo-custom class

testcase.classname: applyLogo SVG content should create img element with data URI for SVG content
testcase.name: applyLogo SVG content should create img element with data URI for SVG content

testcase.classname: applyLogo SVG content should set alt text on SVG img
testcase.name: applyLogo SVG content should set alt text on SVG img

testcase.classname: applyLogo SVG content should apply padding style when SVG has viewBox padding
testcase.name: applyLogo SVG content should apply padding style when SVG has viewBox padding

testcase.classname: applyLogo SVG content should not apply padding when SVG has no viewBox padding
testcase.name: applyLogo SVG content should not apply padding when SVG has no viewBox padding

testcase.classname: applyLogo raster image content should create img element for non-SVG content
testcase.name: applyLogo raster image content should create img element for non-SVG content

testcase.classname: applyLogo raster image content should set alt text on img
testcase.name: applyLogo raster image content should set alt text on img

testcase.classname: applyLogo raster image content should not create SVG for raster content
testcase.name: applyLogo raster image content should not create SVG for raster content

testcase.classname: applySystemName should create span with system name text
testcase.name: applySystemName should create span with system name text

testcase.classname: applySystemName should be idempotent - second call replaces existing span
testcase.name: applySystemName should be idempotent - second call replaces existing span

testcase.classname: applySystemName should not create span for empty name
testcase.name: applySystemName should not create span for empty name

testcase.classname: applySystemName should remove existing span when called with empty name
testcase.name: applySystemName should remove existing span when called with empty name

testcase.classname: applySystemName should apply inline color style when color is provided
testcase.name: applySystemName should apply inline color style when color is provided

testcase.classname: applySystemName should not set inline color when color is empty
testcase.name: applySystemName should not set inline color when color is empty

testcase.classname: applySystemName should not set inline color when color is omitted
testcase.name: applySystemName should not set inline color when color is omitted

testcase.classname: applySplashLogo should inject a style element with the splash URL
testcase.name: applySplashLogo should inject a style element with the splash URL

testcase.classname: applySplashLogo should target #main-logo with background sizing rules
testcase.name: applySplashLogo should target #main-logo with background sizing rules

testcase.classname: applySplashLogo should hide the original inline SVG inside #main-logo
testcase.name: applySplashLogo should hide the original inline SVG inside #main-logo

testcase.classname: applySplashLogo should be idempotent - second call replaces existing style
testcase.name: applySplashLogo should be idempotent - second call replaces existing style

testcase.classname: applySplashLogo should not inject style for empty URL
testcase.name: applySplashLogo should not inject style for empty URL

testcase.classname: applySplashLogo should remove existing style when called with empty URL
testcase.name: applySplashLogo should remove existing style when called with empty URL
